---
title: "Lady Crauford"
---

## Lady Crauford

### Description

contributor to <i>Mothers in Council</i> (1797)

### Biography

CMY’s correspondent has evidently answered a Puzzled Mother in <i>MP</i> in 1896.  Of the three answers printed in <i>Mothers in Council</i> 6 (January 1897) the one which most accords with CMY’s comment is signed ‘Isolda’, and the letter was probably addressed to the Hon. Isolda Caroline Vereker (1852/3-1927), daughter of the 4th Viscount Gort and wife of Sir Charles Craufurd 4th Bt. (1847-1939), R.N..

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
